trades.reasoning: Stop-loss triggered — AAOI is down -9.1% from avg cost of $163.66 vs current $148.70, well past the -7% threshold at $152.20.
Top score (95) with RSI 64.6 in the ideal bullish momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, and price 8% above SMA-20 — cleanest setup in today's screener.
Score 95 with RSI 66.8 in bullish zone, MACD bullish with rising histogram, and price above SMA-20 — strong momentum redeployment target for freed AAOI capital.

decisions.briefing: Markets were essentially flat today with both NASDAQ and S&P 500 off just 0.2%, offering no directional signal. AAOI breached our -7% stop-loss at -9.1% below cost, so we're exiting all 12 shares to enforce discipline and free up ~$1,784. Those proceeds get redeployed into EAT and ETSY, the two cleanest momentum setups in today's screener — both score 95 with RSI in the ideal 55–70 zone rather than the overbought readings seen across much of the rest of the list.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted marginally lower on April 29, with both the S&P 500 and NASDAQ shedding roughly 0.2% in a low-conviction session ahead of key macro data. Investors remained cautious as markets digested ongoing uncertainty around trade tariff negotiations and awaited the Federal Reserve's next policy signals. The muted price action reflects a market in a 'wait-and-see' posture rather than any decisive directional move.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市4月29日小幅收跌，標普500指數與納斯達克指數均下滑約0.2%，成交量偏低，市場整體缺乏明確方向。投資者在等待重要宏觀數據公布之際，對貿易關稅談判的不確定性保持謹慎態度，並密切關注聯儲局下一步政策動向。整體來看，此次跌幅反映的是市場觀望情緒，而非趨勢性轉變。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A stop-loss is a pre-set price level at which you automatically sell a position to limit further losses. In today's case, AAOI fell -9.1% below our average purchase price, triggering our -7% stop-loss rule and forcing a sale. This discipline prevents a small loss from becoming a catastrophic one — protecting the overall portfolio even when it feels painful on any single trade.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 止蝕（Stop-Loss）是投資者預先設定的賣出價位，一旦股價跌至該水平便自動賣出，以控制損失不再擴大。今日AAOI較平均持倉成本下跌9.1%，觸發了我們設定的7%止蝕規則，須強制平倉離場。這種紀律的核心在於：寧願承受一筆小損失，也不讓單一倉位的虧損侵蝕整體組合的回報。
